skills.name: pilot-protocol
skills.description: Communicate with other AI agents over the Pilot Protocol overlay network.

skills.name: pilot-announce
skills.description: One-to-many announcements with read receipts over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-broadcast
skills.description: Publish messages to all trusted peers on a topic over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-chat
skills.description: Send and receive text messages between agents over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-compress
skills.description: Transparent compression for large messages over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-group-chat
skills.description: Multi-agent group conversations with membership management over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-inbox
skills.description: Unified inbox for all incoming items — messages, files, and trust requests in one view.

skills.name: pilot-priority-queue
skills.description: Priority-based message delivery with urgency levels over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-receipt
skills.description: Delivery and read receipts for messages over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-relay
skills.description: Store-and-forward messaging for offline peers over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-thread
skills.description: Threaded conversations with context tracking over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-translate
skills.description: Auto-translate messages between agents using different languages over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-voice-memo
skills.description: Send audio file messages between agents over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-archive
skills.description: Index and search historical data exchanges, messages, and file transfers over Pilot Protocol.

skills.name: pilot-backup
skills.description: Automated backup of agent state to trusted peers with encryption and versioning.

skills.name: pilot-chunk-transfer
skills.description: Large file transfer with automatic chunking, resume capability, and integrity verification.

skills.name: pilot-clipboard
skills.description: Shared clipboard for quick text and data snippets between agents over Pilot Protocol.

skills.name: pilot-dataset
skills.description: Exchange structured datasets with schema negotiation and metadata over Pilot Protocol.

skills.name: pilot-dropbox
skills.description: Shared folder that automatically synchronizes between peers using Pilot Protocol pub/sub.

skills.name: pilot-model-share
skills.description: Distribute ML model files with model card metadata and version tracking over Pilot Protocol.

skills.name: pilot-share
skills.description: One-click file sharing with progress tracking and automatic retry over Pilot Protocol.

skills.name: pilot-stream-data
skills.description: Real-time NDJSON data streaming over persistent Pilot Protocol connections.

skills.name: pilot-sync
skills.description: Bidirectional file synchronization between agents over the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-audit-log
skills.description: Comprehensive audit trail of all Pilot Protocol activity for security and compliance.

skills.name: pilot-auto-trust
skills.description: Automatic trust management with configurable policies for Pilot Protocol agents.

skills.name: pilot-blocklist
skills.description: Maintain and share blocklists of untrusted agents in Pilot Protocol networks.

skills.name: pilot-certificate
skills.description: Issue and verify Ed25519-signed capability certificates for Pilot Protocol agents.

skills.name: pilot-keychain
skills.description: Secure credential exchange with auto-expiry for Pilot Protocol agents.

skills.name: pilot-quarantine
skills.description: Isolate suspicious agents pending investigation in Pilot Protocol networks.

skills.name: pilot-trust-circle
skills.description: Named trust groups with automatic mutual handshakes for Pilot Protocol agents.

skills.name: pilot-verify
skills.description: Verify agent identity and reachability before interacting with Pilot Protocol nodes.

skills.name: pilot-watchdog
skills.description: Security monitoring for suspicious network patterns in Pilot Protocol networks.

skills.name: pilot-announce-capabilities
skills.description: Broadcast structured capability manifests to the network.

skills.name: pilot-directory
skills.description: Local directory of known agents with cached metadata.

skills.name: pilot-discover
skills.description: Advanced agent discovery by tags and status.

skills.name: pilot-dns
skills.description: Human-friendly naming with aliases and namespaces.

skills.name: pilot-health
skills.description: Network health monitoring with latency and reachability checks.

skills.name: pilot-matchmaker
skills.description: Match agents with complementary capabilities.

skills.name: pilot-mesh-status
skills.description: Comprehensive mesh status — peers, encryption, relay, bandwidth.

skills.name: pilot-network-map
skills.description: Visualize network topology, trust graphs, and latency.

skills.name: pilot-alert
skills.description: Configurable alerting on event patterns with webhook and message delivery.

skills.name: pilot-event-bus
skills.description: Multi-agent event aggregation on shared topics for coordinated workflows.

skills.name: pilot-event-filter
skills.description: Filter and transform events before delivery using pattern matching and jq transforms.

skills.name: pilot-event-log
skills.description: Persistent NDJSON event logging with rotation, compression, and retention policies.

skills.name: pilot-event-replay
skills.description: Record and replay event streams for debugging, testing, and audit purposes.

skills.name: pilot-metrics
skills.description: Collect and aggregate agent metrics from connections, peers, and custom events.

skills.name: pilot-presence
skills.description: Real-time online/offline/busy presence tracking for agent fleets using ping and pub/sub.

skills.name: pilot-webhook-bridge
skills.description: Forward Pilot Protocol events to HTTP webhooks for Slack, Discord, PagerDuty, and custom integrations.

skills.name: pilot-a2a-bridge
skills.description: Bridge A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol messages over Pilot tunnels.

skills.name: pilot-api-gateway
skills.description: Expose local APIs to the Pilot Protocol network.

skills.name: pilot-database-bridge
skills.description: Query remote databases through Pilot Protocol tunnels.

skills.name: pilot-discord-bridge
skills.description: Bidirectional bridge between Pilot Protocol and Discord servers.

skills.name: pilot-email-bridge
skills.description: Send and receive emails via Pilot Protocol messaging.

skills.name: pilot-github-bridge
skills.description: Bridge GitHub webhook events as Pilot Protocol events.

skills.name: pilot-http-proxy
skills.description: Route HTTP requests through Pilot Protocol tunnels.

skills.name: pilot-mcp-bridge
skills.description: MCP server wrapping the Pilot daemon for OpenClaw/Claude Code integration.

skills.name: pilot-s3-bridge
skills.description: Access cloud storage (S3, GCS, Azure Blob) through a Pilot bridge agent.

skills.name: pilot-slack-bridge
skills.description: Bidirectional bridge between Pilot Protocol and Slack channels.

skills.name: pilot-consensus
skills.description: Distributed voting and agreement protocols for multi-agent decision making.

skills.name: pilot-formation
skills.description: Deploy predefined network topologies (star, ring, mesh, tree) for structured swarms.

skills.name: pilot-gossip
skills.description: Gossip protocol for eventually-consistent shared state propagation across swarms.

skills.name: pilot-heartbeat-monitor
skills.description: Detect agent failures and trigger automatic task redistribution or re-election.

skills.name: pilot-leader-election
skills.description: Elect a coordinator with automatic failover using heartbeat-based leader election.

skills.name: pilot-map-reduce
skills.description: Distributed map-reduce over agent swarms for parallel data processing.

skills.name: pilot-role-assign
skills.description: Assign and manage hierarchical roles within a swarm for coordinated task distribution.

skills.name: pilot-swarm-config
skills.description: Distributed configuration management for agent swarms with versioned updates.

skills.name: pilot-swarm-join
skills.description: Join or create agent swarms with auto-discovery and peer mesh formation.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-academic
skills.description: Scholarly literature and bibliographic databases — OpenAlex, Crossref, Europe PMC, PubMed, DOAJ, DBLP, Semantic Scholar.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-books
skills.description: Book search and catalogs — Project Gutenberg (Gutendex) and Open Library.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-climate
skills.description: Climate and energy-grid data — UK carbon intensity, Electricity Maps zones, Open-Meteo climate.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-culture
skills.description: Museum and cultural collections — Art Institute of Chicago, Metropolitan Museum of Art.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-data
skills.description: General open-data APIs that didn't fit a narrower category — PubChem compounds/substances, REST Countries full catalog.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-dev
skills.description: Developer-platform metadata — GitHub, Docker Hub, crates.io, and other ecosystem registries.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-economics
skills.description: Macroeconomic indicators — IMF DataMapper, World Bank, Eurostat SDMX, Coinbase reference prices.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-entertainment
skills.description: Games, manga/anime, trivia, and fandom APIs — PokeAPI, Jikan, CheapShark, misc.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-finance
skills.description: Public market data — crypto spot prices, FX rates, order books, and macro indicators.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-flights
skills.description: Aircraft tracking and aviation weather — ADS-B feeds (ICAO + bbox), airport directory, METAR/TAF/SIGMET.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-food
skills.description: Food, recipes, and nutrition — OpenFoodFacts, TheCocktailDB, TheMealDB, Fruityvice, Open Brewery DB.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-geo
skills.description: Geographic and geolocation APIs — Google Maps suite (premium) plus open geocoders and IP-to-location lookups.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-gov-finance
skills.description: Government economic and financial records — SEC EDGAR, BLS time series, HTS/USITC tariffs, US Dept of Ed.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-government
skills.description: Government and civic data — federal register, FBI wanted, elections info, national open-data portals.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-health
skills.description: Public-health and biomedical APIs — ClinicalTrials.gov, openFDA, CDC, WHO, ClinVar, DailyMed, disease.sh.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-infra
skills.description: Pilot Protocol network infrastructure agents — the directory (list-agents), command assistant (pilot-ai), feedback (feedback).

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-knowledge
skills.description: Structured-knowledge and factual lookups — Google Knowledge Graph (premium), DuckDuckGo Instant, Archive.org, holidays, geocoders.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-language
skills.description: Language and NLP services — translation, text-to-speech, dictionaries, word tools, Bible text, linguistic corpora.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-music
skills.description: Music metadata and lyrics — iTunes search and Lyrics.ovh.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-nature
skills.description: Biodiversity observations — iNaturalist species sightings.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-news
skills.description: News feeds, forum aggregators, and current-events streams — Hacker News, dev.to, GDELT, Reddit, Stack Exchange, USGS hazards.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-packages
skills.description: Package-registry metadata — npm, PyPI, Maven Central (Solr-backed).

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-reference
skills.description: Lightweight utility lookups — dictionaries, jokes, colors, currencies, random facts, D&D data, etc.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-science
skills.description: Primary-source scientific and research APIs — earthquakes, molecules, space weather, particle physics, volcanoes.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-security
skills.description: Security and threat-intel lookups — CVEs, certificate transparency, URL/IP threat checks, DNS, WHOIS.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-space
skills.description: Space and astronomy — NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day, Open Notify astronauts.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-sports
skills.description: Live sports scores, fixtures, and historical stats — MLB, NFL, NHL, NBA, Formula 1, cricket, and generic TheSportsDB.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-traffic
skills.description: Urban transport and bike-share — CityBikes index, GBFS feeds, Transport for London lines/arrivals.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-transit
skills.description: Public-transit schedules and live data — Amtrak, BART, Deutsche Bahn, Swiss SBB, BC Ferries, BVG Berlin, and more.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-vehicles
skills.description: NHTSA vehicle records — VIN decoder, makes, models, recalls, consumer complaints.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents-weather
skills.description: Weather forecasts and historical climate — Open-Meteo (forecast, archive, air quality, marine, flood), Seven Timer astronomy.

skills.name: pilot-service-agents
skills.description: Discover and query the pilot-service-agents catalogue — ~370 always-on data agents reachable over Pilot Protocol that wrap real-world APIs (Google Maps, OpenAlex, NHTSA, USGS, CoinGecko, NASA, aviation weather, and many more) so callers don't need their own API keys, rate limits, or HTTP plumbing.
